subject: feat: cross-project alignment items 1-16 from glow-props comparison
body:
CLAUDE.md updates (items 1-4):
- Fix "class" → "component" terminology in Code Organization
- Add React-specific quality checks (dangerouslySetInnerHTML, missing keys)
- Add build tools check and QuickGuide sync notes to AI Notes

Suggested Implementations restructure (items 5-7):
- Extract ~200 lines of inlined implementations to docs/implementations/
- Add Burger Menu and Theme & Dark Mode implementation references
- Replace inline code with summary table linking to 8 implementation files

HamburgerMenu a11y & iOS fixes (items 8-13):
- Switch from role="menu" to disclosure pattern (nav/ul/li)
- Add backdrop overlay with cursor-pointer for iOS Safari
- Add useId() for unique aria-controls
- Add hasBeenOpenRef focus guard (prevents stealing focus on mount)
- Add cancelAnimationFrame cleanup
- Add overscroll-contain on menu card
- Add max-width viewport constraint

Z-index scale (item 14):
- Define CSS variables (--z-base through --z-debug) on :root
- Replace all hardcoded z-index values (100-1000) with variables
- Standardized scale: base(10), sticky(20), drawer(30), menu(50),
  modal(60), toast(70), debug(80)

Safe localStorage wrappers (item 15):
- Add safeStorageGet/safeStorageSet/safeStorageRemove to utils.js
- Replace all raw localStorage calls in AppContext, Discover, pwa.js,
  QuickGuide, and index.html debug pill
- Prevents crashes in sandboxed iframes and enterprise environments

Sharp devDependency (item 16):
- Add sharp ^0.34.5 to devDependencies for generate-icons.mjs

Tags: cross-project, a11y, ui, infrastructure, refactor
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-project-alignment
Semver: minor
